project.name: Open3SDCM
project.description: C++20 library and CLI tool for parsing 3Shape DCM dental scan files and exporting meshes to STL, PLY, or OBJ

conventions.error_handling: Return sensible defaults from public API (empty vectors, false) rather than throwing
conventions.logging: Use spdlog for structured logging, fmt::print for CLI output

steps: DCMParser::ParseDCM(path) - unzip, locate HPS XML, read Schema, collect Properties
DCMParser::ParseBinaryData(nodes, schema, props) - dispatch to detail::ParseVertices and detail::ParseFacets
Optional decryption (Blowfish/OpenSSL for CE schema only)
Interpret raw bytes as vertices/ triangles
Store vertices as flat std::vector<float> in x,y,z order
Store triangles as std::vector<Triangle> with 0-based indices
DCMParser::ExportMesh(outputPath, format) - build aiScene, use assimp exporter

ce_schema_requirement: Requires PackageLockList property for decryption key derivation via MD5
